title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART D-4. EXTENDED FOSTER CARE PROGRAM

§288.1. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Extended Foster Care Program Act".

            Acts 2019, No. 400, §2, eff. June 19, 2019.
doc_text:
SUBPART D-4.  EXTENDED FOSTER CARE PROGRAM
§288.1.  Short title
This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Extended Foster Care Program
Act".
Acts 2019, No. 400, §2, eff. June 19, 2019.
